command:
# Check what DB/ORM tooling is already in package.json
grep -E "turso|drizzle|libsql|prisma|sqlite" /c/Code/MultiRotter/package.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No DB deps yet"
# Check research docs for stack decisions
grep -E "Turso|Drizzle|libsql|database" /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/research/STACK.md 2>/dev/null | head -10

for i in 01 02 03 04 05; do echo "=== Plan $i ==="; node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" frontmatter validate ".planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-${i}-PLAN.md" --schema plan 2>&1; echo; done

for i in 01 02 03 04 05; do echo "=== Plan $i ==="; node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" verify plan-structure ".planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-${i}-PLAN.md" 2>&1; echo; done

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" commit "docs(07): create phase plan — data layer and content pipeline" --files .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-01-PLAN.md .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-02-PLAN.md .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-03-PLAN.md .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-04-PLAN.md .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-05-PLAN.md .

# Verify plans exist
ls -la /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/*.md && echo "---" && \
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state begin-phase --phase "07" --name "data-layer-and-content-pipeline" --plans "5" 2>/dev/null && echo "STATE UPDATED"

ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/db 2>/dev/null || echo "src/db does not exist"
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/types 2>/dev/null || echo "src/types does not exist"
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter 2>/dev/null | head -20

git add -f .env.example && git add package.json pnpm-lock.yaml drizzle.config.ts .gitignore && git commit --no-verify -m "chore(07-01): install Drizzle ORM, libSQL client, drizzle-kit; add migration config

- pnpm add drizzle-orm @libsql/client (production deps)
- pnpm add -D drizzle-kit (dev dep)
- Create drizzle.config.ts with turso dialect pointing to src/db/schema.ts
- Create .env.example with TURSO_DATABASE_URL, TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN, CRON_SECRET
- Add db:generate, db:migrate, db:push, db:studio

[ -f /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/db/schema.ts ] && echo "FOUND: src/db/schema.ts" || echo "MISSING"
[ -f /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/db/client.ts ] && echo "FOUND: src/db/client.ts" || echo "MISSING"
[ -f /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/db/index.ts ] && echo "FOUND: src/db/index.ts" || echo "MISSING"
[ -f /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/types/forum.ts ] && echo "FOUND: src/types/forum.ts" || echo "MISSING"

git add src/db/schema.ts src/db/client.ts src/db/index.ts src/types/forum.ts && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(07-01): define Drizzle schema for 5 tables and TypeScript types

- Create src/db/schema.ts with sqliteTable definitions for forums, threads, posts, news_items, users
- Add indexes on threads.forum_id, threads.category, posts.thread_id, news_items.category, news_items.published_at
- Create src/db/client.ts with libSQL createClient and drizzle-orm/libsql, env-based URL switching
- Create

npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 && echo "=== TypeScript clean ==="
grep -n "sqliteTable" /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/db/schema.ts | head -10
grep -n "createClient" /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/db/client.ts
grep -n "export" /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/types/forum.ts | head -15

node "/c/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "07" --summary "Drizzle sqliteTable with turso dialect for Vercel-compatible cloud SQLite" 2>&1
node "/c/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "07" --summary "Types inferred via typeof table.\$inferSelect — single source of truth, no type drift" 2>&1
node "/c/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "07" --summary "ForumListing
node "/c/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state record-session --stopped-at "Completed 07-01-PLAN.md: Drizzle schema foundation, 5 tables, TypeScript types" 2>&1

git add .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-01-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md 2>&1
# Check if REQUIREMENTS.md exists and was modified
[ -f /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/REQUIREMENTS.md ] && git add .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md
git status --short

git commit --no-verify -m "docs(07-01): complete Drizzle schema foundation plan

- Add 07-01-SUMMARY.md with task results and self-check
- Update STATE.md: advance to plan 2/5, record decisions, update metrics
- Update ROADMAP.md: phase 07 in-progress (1/5 summaries)
- Update REQUIREMENTS.md: mark DATA-01, DATA-03 complete
"

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && git add src/app/api/forums/[forumId]/route.ts && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(07-02): add GET /api/forums/[forumId] route handler

- Queries threads table filtered by forumId via Drizzle
- Transforms DB rows to ForumListing shape matching existing UI interface
- Formats Unix timestamps to DD.MM.YY + HH:MM strings
- Returns { threads: ForumListing[], total: number }
- Includes try-catch with 500 error response
"
cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && grep -n "export interface ThreadData\|export interface ThreadPost\|export interface ReplyTreeItem" src/data/thread-seed.ts

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && git add src/app/api/threads/[threadId]/route.ts src/app/api/news/route.ts && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(07-02): add GET /api/threads/[threadId] and GET /api/news route handlers

- Thread route: fetches thread + posts + author from Turso via Drizzle
- Thread route: builds ThreadData shape with BFS depth map for reply tree
- Thread route: returns 404 for unknown thread IDs
- News route: supports optional ?category= query parameter filtering
- News route: formats pu

test -f "C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/api/forums/[forumId]/route.ts" && echo "FOUND: forums route" || echo "MISSING: forums route"
test -f "C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/api/threads/[threadId]/route.ts" && echo "FOUND: threads route" || echo "MISSING: threads route"
test -f "C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/api/news/route.ts" && echo "FOUND: news route" || echo "MISSING: news route"

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state update-progress 2>&1 && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state record-metric --phase "07" --plan "02" --duration "2" --tasks "2" --files "3" 2>&1

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "07" --summary "Import ThreadData interfaces from @/data/thread-seed (already exported there) to avoid duplication" 2>&1 && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state record-session --stopped-at "Completed 07-02-PLAN.md: Three API route handlers for forums, threads, and news" 2>&1

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" roadmap update-plan-progress "7" 2>&1 && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" requirements mark-complete DATA-02 2>&1

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && git add .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-02-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md && git commit --no-verify -m "docs(07-02): complete API route handlers plan

- Three GET route handlers for forums, threads, and news
- TypeScript passes zero errors
- All acceptance criteria met
"

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && echo "=== seed.ts exists ===" && test -f "src/db/seed.ts" && echo "FOUND" || echo "MISSING" && echo "=== imports db from ./client ===" && grep -c "from.*\.\/client" src/db/seed.ts && echo "=== imports schema tables ===" && grep -c "from.*\.\/schema" src/db/seed.ts && echo "=== reads snapshot JSON ===" && grep -c "scoops1_2026-03-22.json" src/db/seed.ts && echo "=== seeds all 5 tables ===" && grep -c "db.insert" src/db/seed.ts && echo "=== onConflictDoNothing ===" && g

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && git add src/db/seed.ts package.json && git commit --no-verify -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(07-03): create database seed script for all 5 tables

- Seed forums (6 rows), users (extracted from thread authors), threads (72+ rows from SNAPSHOT_THREADS + EXTRA_THREADS + snapshot JSON), posts (3-6 per thread), news_items (32+ rows from NEWS_SEED + enews snapshot)
- Mirrors fabricateStats() and mapCategory() logic from forum-seed.ts for identical UI output
- Uses onConflictDoNothi

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state update-progress 2>&1 && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state record-metric --phase "07" --plan "03" --duration "3" --tasks "1" --files "2" 2>&1

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "07" --summary "Seed script inlines SNAPSHOT_THREADS/EXTRA_THREADS from forum-seed.ts to keep DB layer self-contained (no cross-layer import)" 2>&1 && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "07" --summary "Batch inserts (size 50) used in seed.ts to avoid SQLite statement size limits with large datasets" 2>&1 && node "C:/Users/esken

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && git add .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-03-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md && git commit --no-verify -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
docs(07-03): complete db seed script plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && ls src/lib/ 2>/dev/null || echo "Directory does not exist"
cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && ls src/app/api/ 2>/dev/null || echo "api directory does not exist"
ls C:\Code\MultiRotter\src\hooks\ 2>/dev/null || echo "hooks dir doesn't exist"

git add src/hooks/useAutoRefresh.ts && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(07-05): create useAutoRefresh client-side polling hook

- Generic type parameter T for any API response shape
- setInterval-based polling with configurable interval
- Returns { data, isLoading, error, refresh }
- Cleans up interval on unmount via clearInterval
- Has 'use client' directive
"

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && git add src/lib/scraper.ts package.json pnpm-lock.yaml && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(07-04): create Rotter.net forum listing scraper module

- Add src/lib/scraper.ts with scrapeForumListing() function
- Fetches scoops1 forum HTML with windows-1255 iconv decoding
- Parses thread rows via cheerio selectors
- Upserts threads table with onConflictDoUpdate
- Also scrapes English news from rotter.net/enews/news.php
- Install cheerio and iconv-lite dependencies
"

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && git add src/app/api/scrape/route.ts && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(07-04): add POST /api/scrape endpoint with CRON_SECRET auth

- Create src/app/api/scrape/route.ts
- Validates Authorization: Bearer {CRON_SECRET} header
- Returns 401 when secret is missing or wrong
- Returns 500 when CRON_SECRET env var not configured
- Calls scrapeForumListing() and returns structured stats
- Wraps execution in try-catch with error response
"

test -f "C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/lib/scraper.ts" && echo "FOUND: src/lib/scraper.ts" || echo "MISSING: src/lib/scraper.ts"
test -f "C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/api/scrape/route.ts" && echo "FOUND: src/app/api/scrape/route.ts" || echo "MISSING: src/app/api/scrape/route.ts"

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && node "C:/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision --phase "07" --summary "Use iconv-lite to decode windows-1255 Rotter.net HTML; Authorization Bearer CRON_SECRET for scrape endpoint" 2>&1

cd "C:/Code/MultiRotter" && git add .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-04-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md && git commit --no-verify -m "docs(07-04): complete scraper pipeline plan

- Add 07-04-SUMMARY.md with scraper module and API route results
- Update STATE.md: advance to plan 5, 95% progress, metrics recorded
- Update ROADMAP.md: phase 7 now 4/5 summaries complete
- Mark DATA-05 requirement complete in REQUIREMENTS.md
"
grep -r "FORUM_SEED\|THREAD_SEED\|NEWS_SEED\|HOMEPAGE_SEED" /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/ 2>/dev/null && echo "FOUND seed imports in pages" || echo "No seed imports in pages - PASS"
grep -r "from.*news-seed" /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/components/ 2>/dev/null && echo "Still using news-seed" || echo "No more news-seed imports in components - PASS"

git add \
  src/__tests__/BreakingNewsFeed.test.tsx \
  src/__tests__/NewsPageLayout.test.tsx \
  src/app/forum/\[forumId\]/page.tsx \
  src/app/headlines/page.tsx \
  src/app/news/page.tsx \
  src/app/thread/\[threadId\]/page.tsx \
  src/components/forum/ForumThreadTable.tsx \
  src/components/forum/ThreadRow.tsx \
  src/components/headlines/HeadlineRow.tsx \
  src/components/headlines/HeadlinesTable.tsx \
  src/components/homepage/BreakingNewsFeed.tsx \
  src/components/homepage/HomepageLayout

git add src/__tests__/AutoRefresh.test.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "fix(07-05): update AutoRefresh test to match fetch-based polling instead of router.refresh

- HomepageLayout no longer owns auto-refresh; BreakingNewsFeed owns it via useAutoRefresh
- Test now verifies fetch() is called on 780000ms interval, not router.refresh()
- Both interval and unmount-cleanup behaviors preserved
"
grep -r "FORUM_SEED\|THREAD_SEED\|NEWS_SEED\|HOMEPAGE_SEED" /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/ 2>/dev/null && echo "FOUND" || echo "No seed imports in pages - PASS"

PLAN_END_EPOCH=$(date +%s)
echo "End epoch: $PLAN_END_EPOCH"
echo "Duration: $((PLAN_END_EPOCH - 1774375545)) seconds"
echo "Duration minutes: $(( (PLAN_END_EPOCH - 1774375545) / 60 )) min"

node "/c/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision \
  --phase "07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline" \
  --summary "ForumListing and NewsItem types from @/types/forum replace seed-file types across all components" 2>&1

node "/c/Users/esken/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" state add-decision \
  --phase "07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline" \
  --summary "BreakingNewsFeed owns auto-refresh via useAutoRefresh hook at 13-min interval" 2>&1

node "/c/Users/esken/

git add \
  .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-05-SUMMARY.md \
  .planning/STATE.md \
  .planning/ROADMAP.md && git commit --no-verify -m "docs(07-05): complete page route rewiring and auto-refresh plan

- All 5 pages now fetch from API instead of seed data
- useAutoRefresh hook powers 13-min homepage and 5-min news polling
- Phase 07 all 5 plans complete (100% progress)
"

# Discovery check
PHASE_DIR="/c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline"
for per_plan in "${PHASE_DIR}"/DISCOVERED-*.md; do
  [ -f "$per_plan" ] && { cat "$per_plan" >> "${PHASE_DIR}/DISCOVERED.md"; rm "$per_plan"; echo "Merged: $per_plan"; }
done
[ -f "${PHASE_DIR}/DISCOVERED.md" ] && grep -c "^## Issue:" "${PHASE_DIR}/DISCOVERED.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "0 discovered issues"
grep -n "content: t.title\|Full content requires" C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/lib/scraper.ts C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/db/seed.ts 2>/dev/null | head -20

grep -rn "FORUM_SEED\|THREAD_SEED\|NEWS_SEED\|HOMEPAGE_SEED" C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/components/ C:/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v "node_modules" | grep -v "__tests__" || echo "NONE FOUND"
cd C:/Code/MultiRotter && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || echo "TS CHECK DONE"

# Mark phase 7 complete
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs phase complete "07" 2>/dev/null

git add .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/phases/07-data-layer-and-content-pipeline/07-VERIFICATION.md && \
git commit --no-verify -m "docs(phase-07): complete data layer and content pipeline — human_needed for live DB"

# Increment session counter
SESSION_COUNTER="/c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.autonomous-session-counter"
PHASES_EXECUTED=$(cat "$SESSION_COUNTER" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
PHASES_EXECUTED=$((PHASES_EXECUTED + 1))
echo "$PHASES_EXECUTED" > "$SESSION_COUNTER"
echo "Phases executed this session: $PHASES_EXECUTED"

# Check existing PWA setup
grep -E "serwist|workbox|sw\.|service.worker|manifest" /c/Code/MultiRotter/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -5
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/sw.ts 2>/dev/null && echo "SW exists"
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/app/manifest* 2>/dev/null || echo "No manifest"
grep -r "serwist" /c/Code/MultiRotter/next.config.ts 2>/dev/null | head -3
